454: function buildListFilesCommand(absolutePath: string, rootPath: string): string {
455:   return `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} ${shellQuote(rootPath)} <<'PY'
456: import json
457: import os
458: import sys
459: 
460: path = sys.argv[1]
461: root = sys.argv[2]
462: root_real = os.path.realpath(root)
463: target = path if os.path.isabs(path) else os.path.join(root, path)
464: target_real = os.path.realpath(target)
465: if os.path.commonpath([root_real, target_real]) != root_real:
466:     print(json.dumps({'error':'path_escape'}))
467:     raise SystemExit(0)
468: if not os.path.exists(target_real):
469:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))
470:     raise SystemExit(0)
471: if not os.path.isdir(target_real):
472:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_directory'}))
473:     raise SystemExit(0)
474: entries = []
475: for name in sorted(os.listdir(target_real)):
476:     full = os.path.join(target_real, name)
477:     entries.append({'name': name, 'type': 'directory' if os.path.isdir(full) else 'file'})
478: print(json.dumps({'entries': entries[:200]}))
479: PY`;
480: }
481: 
482: function buildReadFileCommand(absolutePath: string, maxBytes: number, rootPath: string): string {
483:   return `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} ${maxBytes} ${shellQuote(rootPath)} <<'PY'
484: import json
485: import os
486: import sys
487: 
488: path = sys.argv[1]
489: max_bytes = int(sys.argv[2])
490: root = sys.argv[3]
491: root_real = os.path.realpath(root)
492: target = path if os.path.isabs(path) else os.path.join(root, path)
493: target_real = os.path.realpath(target)
494: if os.path.commonpath([root_real, target_real]) != root_real:
495:     print(json.dumps({'error':'path_escape'}))
496:     raise SystemExit(0)
497: if not os.path.exists(target_real):
498:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))
499:     raise SystemExit(0)
500: if not os.path.isfile(target_real):
501:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_file'}))
502:     raise SystemExit(0)
503: with open(target_real, 'rb') as f:
504:     data = f.read(max_bytes + 1)
505: truncated = len(data) > max_bytes
506: if truncated:
507:     data = data[:max_bytes]
508: text = data.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
509: print(json.dumps({'content': text, 'truncated': truncated, 'bytes': len(data)}))
510: PY`;
511: }
512: 
513: function assertWorkspacePath(pathInput: string, policy: ReviewCommandPolicy): string {
514:   const trimmed = (pathInput || '.').trim();
515:   const normalized = trimmed.replace(/\\/g, '/');
516:   if (normalized.includes('\u0000')) {
517:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path contains null bytes');
518:   }
519:   if (normalized.startsWith('/') || normalized.startsWith('..') || normalized.includes('/../')) {
520:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path escapes workspace root');
521:   }
522:   const collapsed = normalized
523:     .split('/')
524:     .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.')
525:     .join('/');
526:   if (collapsed.startsWith('..')) {
527:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path escapes workspace root');
528:   }
529:   if (collapsed === '.git' || collapsed.startsWith('.git/')) {
530:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Access to .git is denied by policy');
531:   }
532:   return `${policy.rootPath}/${collapsed}`;
533: }
534: 
535: async function runSandboxCommand(
536:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
537:   command: string,
538:   timeout?: number
539: ): Promise<{ stdout: string; stderr: string }> {
540:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout });
541:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
542:     const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
543:     throw new Error(`Sandbox command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`);
544:   }
545:   return { stdout: result.stdout, stderr: result.stderr };
546: }
547: 
548: async function executeReviewTool(
549:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
550:   action: Extract<ReviewAgentAction, { type: 'tool' }>,
551:   policy: ReviewCommandPolicy,
552:   maxFileBytes: number,
553:   authoritativeDiffSnapshot?: unknown
554: ): Promise<ReviewToolContext> {
555:   if (action.tool === 'list_files') {
556:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path ?? '.', policy);
557:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
558:       sandbox,
559:       buildListFilesCommand(absolutePath, policy.rootPath)
560:     );
561:     return {
562:       request: { path: action.args.path ?? '.' },
563:       result: JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}'),
564:     };
565:   }
566: 
567:   if (action.tool === 'read_file') {
568:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path, policy);
569:     const maxBytes = typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(action.args.maxBytes)
570:       ? Math.max(1, Math.min(maxFileBytes, Math.floor(action.args.maxBytes)))
571:       : maxFileBytes;
572:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
573:       sandbox,
574:       buildReadFileCommand(absolutePath, maxBytes, policy.rootPath)
575:     );
576:     return {
577:       request: { path: action.args.path, maxBytes },
578:       result: JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}'),
579:     };
580:   }
581: 
582:   if (action.tool === 'run_command') {
583:     return {
584:       request: { command: action.args.command, timeoutMs: action.args.timeoutMs ?? DEFAULT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS },
585:       result: {
586:         error: 'run_command is disabled in review mode; use list_files, read_file, or diff_summary only',
587:         disabled: true,
588:       },
589:     };
590:   }
591: 
592:   if (action.tool === 'write_file') {
593:     return {
594:       request: { path: action.args.path },
595:       result: {
596:         ok: false,
597:         error: 'write_file is disabled in review mode; use read-only tools and return findings only',
598:         path: action.args.path,
599:       },
600:     };
601:   }
602: 
603:   if (authoritativeDiffSnapshot !== undefined) {
604:     const maxBytes = typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(action.args.maxBytes)
605:       ? Math.max(1_024, Math.min(policy.maxOutputBytes, Math.floor(action.args.maxBytes)))
606:       : Math.min(policy.maxOutputBytes, 64_000);
607:     return {
608:       request: { maxBytes },
609:       result: clampAuthoritativeDiffSnapshot(authoritativeDiffSnapshot, maxBytes),
610:     };
611:   }
612: 
613:   return {
614:     request: { maxBytes: typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' ? action.args.maxBytes : undefined },
615:     result: {
616:       error: 'authoritative diff snapshot unavailable',
617:       changedFiles: [],
618:       patch: '',
619:       truncated: false,
620:     },
621:   };
622: }

624: class CloudflareAgentSdkReviewProvider implements ReviewAgentProvider {
625:   constructor(
626:     private readonly endpoint: string,
627:     private readonly authToken: string | null
628:   ) {}
629: 
630:   async next(input: {
631:     prompt: string;
632:     model: string;
633:     maxSteps: number;
634:     step: number;
635:     history: ReviewAgentHistoryEntry[];
636:   }): Promise<ReviewAgentAction> {
637:     const response = await fetch(this.endpoint, {
638:       method: 'POST',
639:       headers: {
640:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
641:         ...(this.authToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${this.authToken}` } : {}),
642:       },
643:       body: JSON.stringify({
644:         mode: 'workspace_task',
645:         prompt: input.prompt,
646:         model: input.model,
647:         maxSteps: input.maxSteps,
648:         step: input.step,
649:         history: input.history,
650:       }),
651:     });
652: 
653:     if (!response.ok) {
654:       if (response.status >= 500 || response.status === 429) {
655:         throw new Error(`Review analysis provider temporarily unavailable (status ${response.status})`);
656:       }
657:       throw new Error(`Review analysis provider request failed with status ${response.status}`);
658:     }
659: 
660:     const parsed = (await response.json()) as unknown;
661:     const action = asRecord(parsed).action;
662:     return validateReviewAgentAction(action);
663:   }
664: }
665: 
666: function validateReviewAgentAction(action: unknown): ReviewAgentAction {
667:   const record = asRecord(action);
668:   if (record.type === 'final') {
669:     const summary = typeof record.summary === 'string' ? record.summary.trim() : '';
670:     if (!summary) {
671:       throw new ReviewPolicyError('Final action requires a non-empty summary');
672:     }
673:     return { type: 'final', summary };
674:   }
675:   if (record.type !== 'tool') {
676:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Action type must be tool or final');
677:   }
678: 
679:   const tool = typeof record.tool === 'string' ? record.tool : '';
680:   const args = asRecord(record.args);
681:   switch (tool) {
682:     case 'list_files':
683:       if (args.path !== undefined && typeof args.path !== 'string') {
684:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('list_files.path must be a string when provided');
685:       }
686:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args };
687:     case 'read_file':
688:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
689:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('read_file.path is required');
690:       }
691:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
692:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('read_file.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
693:       }
694:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { path: args.path, maxBytes: args.maxBytes as number | undefined } };
695:     case 'write_file':
696:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
697:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('write_file.path is required');
698:       }
699:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { path: args.path, content: typeof args.content === 'string' ? args.content : undefined } };
700:     case 'run_command':
701:       if (typeof args.command !== 'string' || !args.command.trim()) {
702:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('run_command.command is required');
703:       }
704:       if (args.timeoutMs !== undefined && (typeof args.timeoutMs !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.timeoutMs))) {
705:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('run_command.timeoutMs must be a number when provided');
706:       }
707:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { command: args.command, timeoutMs: args.timeoutMs as number | undefined } };
708:     case 'diff_summary':
709:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
710:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('diff_summary.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
711:       }
712:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { maxBytes: args.maxBytes as number | undefined } };
713:     default:
714:       throw new ReviewPolicyError(`Tool '${tool}' is not supported in review mode`);
715:   }

718: async function getWorkspaceSandbox(env: Env, sandboxId: string): Promise<SandboxClient> {
719:   const { getSandbox } = await import('@cloudflare/sandbox');
720:   return getSandbox(env.Sandbox as DurableObjectNamespace<Sandbox>, sandboxId) as SandboxClient;
721: }

732:   rootListing: unknown;

739:     maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,

741:   };

744:     sandbox,

746:     policy,
747:     maxFileBytes
748:   );
749:   const diffSnapshot = await executeReviewTool(
750:     sandbox,
751:     { type: 'tool', tool: 'diff_summary', args: { maxBytes: 32_000 } },

758: export async function readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(
759:   env: Env,
760:   input: {
761:     sourceBundleKey: string;
762:     sandboxId: string;
763:     paths: string[];
764:     maxFileBytes?: number;
765:   }
766: ): Promise<ReviewSourceFileReadResult[]> {
767:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
768:   const effectiveMaxFileBytes = typeof input.maxFileBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(input.maxFileBytes)
769:     ? Math.max(1_024, Math.min(maxFileBytes, Math.floor(input.maxFileBytes)))
770:     : maxFileBytes;
771: 
772:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
773:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review context assembly');
774:   }
775:   const bundle =
776:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
777:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
778:   if (!bundle) {
779:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
780:   }
781: 
782:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.sandboxId);
783:   try {
784:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
785: 
786:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
787:       commandAllow: [],
788:       commandDeny: [],
789:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
790:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
791:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
792:     };
793: 
794:     const uniquePaths = Array.from(new Set(input.paths.map((path) => path.trim()).filter(Boolean)));
795:     const results: ReviewSourceFileReadResult[] = [];
796:     for (const path of uniquePaths) {
797:       const toolResult = await executeReviewTool(
798:         sandbox,
799:         { type: 'tool', tool: 'read_file', args: { path, maxBytes: effectiveMaxFileBytes } },
800:         policy,
801:         effectiveMaxFileBytes
802:       );
803:       const resultRecord = asRecord(toolResult.result);
804:       const error = typeof resultRecord.error === 'string' ? resultRecord.error : null;
805:       const content = typeof resultRecord.content === 'string' ? resultRecord.content : null;
806:       const bytes = typeof resultRecord.bytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(resultRecord.bytes)
807:         ? Math.max(0, Math.floor(resultRecord.bytes))
808:         : 0;
809:       const truncated = Boolean(resultRecord.truncated);
810:       results.push({
811:         path,
812:         content,
813:         bytes,
814:         truncated,
815:         error,
816:       });
817:     }
818: 
819:     return results;
820:   } finally {
821:     if (typeof sandbox.destroy === 'function') {
822:       try {
823:         await sandbox.destroy();
824:       } catch {
825:         // Best-effort cleanup only.
826:       }
827:     }
828:   }
829: }

831: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(
832:   env: Env,
833:   input: ReviewAgentPromptInput & {
834:     deploymentSandboxId: string;
835:   }
836: ): Promise<ReviewAgentAnalysisResult | null> {
837:   const endpoint = (env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim();
838:   if (!endpoint) {
839:     return null;
840:   }
841: 
842:   const model = (env.AGENT_MODEL ?? 'claude-3-7-sonnet').trim() || 'claude-3-7-sonnet';
843:   const authToken = (env.AGENT_SDK_AUTH_TOKEN ?? '').trim() || null;
844:   const maxSteps = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, DEFAULT_REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, 1, 12);
845:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
846:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
847:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review analysis');
848:   }
849:   const bundle =
850:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
851:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
852:   if (!bundle) {
853:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
854:   }
855: 
856:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.deploymentSandboxId);
857:   try {
858:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
859:     const { rootListing, diffSnapshot } = await snapshotInitialContext(sandbox, maxFileBytes);
860:     const prompt = buildReviewAgentPrompt(
861:       sanitizePromptInput({
862:         ...input,
863:         rootListing,
864:         diffSnapshot,
865:       })
866:     );
867: 
868:     const provider = new CloudflareAgentSdkReviewProvider(endpoint, authToken);
869:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
870:       commandAllow: [],
871:       commandDeny: ['git ', 'rm ', 'npm ', 'pnpm ', 'yarn ', 'bun ', 'mkdir ', 'mv ', 'cp ', 'touch '],
872:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
873:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
874:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
875:     };
876: 
877:     const history: ReviewAgentHistoryEntry[] = [];
878:     const usedTools: string[] = [];
879:     let malformedFinalOutputError: ReviewAgentOutputError | null = null;
880:     for (let step = 1; step <= maxSteps; step += 1) {
881:       const action = await provider.next({
882:         prompt,
883:         model,
884:         maxSteps,
885:         step,
886:         history,
887:       });
888: 
889:       if (action.type === 'final') {
890:         try {
891:           const parsed = parseFinalReport(input.reviewId, action.summary);
892:           return {
893:             ...parsed,
894:             provider: 'cloudflare_agents_sdk',
895:             model,
896:             stepsExecuted: step,
897:             usedTools,
898:           };
899:         } catch (error) {
900:           if (error instanceof ReviewAgentOutputError && isGenericProviderCompletionSummary(action.summary)) {
901:             throw new ReviewAgentOutputError(
902:               'Review agent returned provider completion text instead of structured JSON; verify AGENT_SDK_URL points to the Nimbus-compatible action endpoint'
903:             );
904:           }
905: 
906:           if (error instanceof ReviewAgentOutputError && step < maxSteps) {
907:             malformedFinalOutputError = error;
908:             history.push({
909:               role: 'assistant',
910:               content: 'final_output_validator: returned final summary did not match required JSON schema; retrying final output',
911:             });
912:             history.push({
913:               role: 'tool',
914:               tool: 'final_output_validator',
915:               output: {
916:                 ok: false,
917:                 error: 'Final summary must be a raw JSON object with summary, intent, and findings fields.',
918:                 requiredShape: {
919:                   summary: {
920:                     riskLevel: 'low|medium|high|critical',
921:                     recommendation: 'approve|comment|request_changes',
922:                   },
923:                   intent: {
924:                     goal: 'string|null',
925:                     constraints: 'string[]',
926:                     decisions: 'string[]',
927:                   },
928:                   findings: 'array',
929:                 },
930:               },
931:             });
932:             continue;
933:           }
934: 
935:           throw error;
936:         }
937:       }
938: 
939:       const output = await executeReviewTool(
940:         sandbox,
941:         action,
942:         policy,
943:         maxFileBytes,
944:         action.tool === 'diff_summary' ? input.authoritativeDiffSnapshot : undefined
945:       );
946:       usedTools.push(action.tool);
947:       history.push({ role: 'assistant', content: buildToolHistoryLabel(action) });
948:       history.push({ role: 'tool', tool: action.tool, output: sanitizeToolContext(output) });
949:     }
950: 
951:     if (malformedFinalOutputError) {
952:       throw malformedFinalOutputError;
953:     }
954:     throw new Error('Review analysis exceeded maximum step count');
955:   } finally {
956:     if (typeof sandbox.destroy === 'function') {
957:       try {
958:         await sandbox.destroy();
959:       } catch {
960:         // Best-effort cleanup only.
961:       }
962:     }
963:   }
964: }
965: 
966: export function formatReviewAnalysisError(error: unknown): string {
967:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
968:   return sanitizeErrorMessage(message);
969: }

344:   return {
345:     goal: redactReviewText(intent.goal),
346:     constraints: intent.constraints.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
347:     decisions: intent.decisions.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
348:   };
349: }
350: 
351: function parseChangedPathsFromDiff(patch: string): string[] {
352:   const paths = new Set<string>();
353:   for (const line of patch.split('\n')) {
354:     if (!line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
355:       continue;
356:     }
357:     const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
358:     if (!raw || raw === '/dev/null') {
359:       continue;
360:     }
361:     const normalized = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
362:     if (!normalized || normalized === '/dev/null') {
363:       continue;
364:     }
365:     paths.add(normalized);
366:   }
367:   return Array.from(paths);
368: }
369: 
370: function parseDiffHunks(patch: string): Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> {
371:   const lines = patch.split('\n');
372:   const hunks: Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> = [];
373:   let currentPath: string | null = null;
374:   let currentLines: string[] = [];
375: 
376:   const flush = () => {
377:     if (!currentPath) {
378:       return;
379:     }
380:     hunks.push({
381:       path: currentPath,
382:       patch: currentLines.join('\n').trim(),
383:     });
384:   };
385: 
386:   for (const line of lines) {
387:     if (line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
388:       flush();
389:       const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
390:       currentPath = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
391:       currentLines = [line];
392:       continue;
393:     }
394:     if (currentPath) {
395:       currentLines.push(line);
396:     }
397:   }
398: 
399:   flush();
400:   return hunks.filter((hunk) => hunk.path && hunk.path !== '/dev/null');
401: }
402: 
403: function parentDirectories(path: string): string[] {
404:   const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
405:   const dirs = [''];
406:   let current = '';
407:   for (let index = 0; index < parts.length - 1; index += 1) {
408:     current = current ? `${current}/${parts[index]}` : parts[index] as string;
409:     dirs.push(current);
410:   }
411:   return dirs;
412: }
413: 
414: const CONVENTION_PATTERNS = [
415:   'AGENTS.md',
416:   'CODE_REVIEW.md',
417:   'CONTRIBUTING.md',
418:   '.editorconfig',
419:   '.eslintrc',
420:   '.eslintrc.js',
421:   '.eslintrc.cjs',
422:   '.eslintrc.json',
423:   '.eslintrc.yaml',
424:   '.eslintrc.yml',
425:   'eslint.config.js',
426:   'eslint.config.mjs',
427:   'eslint.config.cjs',
428:   'biome.json',
429:   'biome.jsonc',
430:   'prettier.config.js',
431:   'prettier.config.mjs',
432:   'prettier.config.cjs',
433:   '.prettierrc',
434:   '.prettierrc.json',
435:   '.prettierrc.yaml',
436:   '.prettierrc.yml',
437:   'pyproject.toml',
438:   'ruff.toml',
439:   'mypy.ini',
440:   'tsconfig.json',
441:   'tsconfig.base.json',
442:   'tsconfig.app.json',
443:   'tsconfig.node.json',
444: ] as const;
445: 
446: function discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths: string[], maxCount = 10): string[] {
447:   const candidates = new Set<string>();
448:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
449:     const dirs = parentDirectories(changedPath);
450:     for (const dir of dirs) {
451:       for (const pattern of CONVENTION_PATTERNS) {
452:         const candidate = dir ? `${dir}/${pattern}` : pattern;
453:         candidates.add(candidate);
454:         if (candidates.size >= maxCount * 6) {
455:           return Array.from(candidates);
456:         }
457:       }
458:     }
459:   }
460:   return Array.from(candidates);
461: }
462: 
463: function estimateTokenCount(parts: string[]): number {
464:   const chars = parts.reduce((total, part) => total + part.length, 0);
465:   return Math.ceil(chars / 4);
466: }
467: 
468: function readOptionalString(value: unknown): string | null {
469:   return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() ? value.trim() : null;
470: }
471: 
472: function readOptionalNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
473:   return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : null;
474: }
475: 
476: function parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(record: Record<string, unknown>): string[] {
477:   const candidates = [record.touchedFiles, record.touched_files, record.changedFiles, record.changed_files, record.files];
478:   for (const candidate of candidates) {
479:     if (!Array.isArray(candidate)) {
480:       continue;
481:     }
482:     const parsed = candidate
483:       .flatMap((item) => {
484:         if (typeof item === 'string') {
485:           return [item.trim()];
486:         }
487:         const entry = asRecord(item);
488:         const path = readOptionalString(entry.path);
489:         return path ? [path] : [];
490:       })
491:       .filter(Boolean);
492:     if (parsed.length > 0) {
493:       return parsed;
494:     }
495:   }
496:   return [];
497: }
498: 
499: function buildGitHubHeaders(env: Env): Record<string, string> {
500:   const headers: Record<string, string> = {
501:     Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
502:     'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
503:   };
504:   const token = readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN);
505:   if (token) {
506:     headers.Authorization = token.toLowerCase().startsWith('bearer ') ? token : `Bearer ${token}`;
507:   }
508:   return headers;
509: }
510: 
511: async function fetchGitHubJson(env: Env, url: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
512:   const response = await fetch(url, {
513:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(env),
514:   });
515: 
516:   if (!response.ok) {
517:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
518:       'review_context_github_api_error',
519:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}`
520:     );
521:   }
522: 
523:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
524:   return asRecord(data);
525: }
526: 
527: async function fetchGitHubArray(env: Env, url: string): Promise<unknown[]> {
528:   const response = await fetch(url, {
529:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(env),
530:   });
531: 
532:   if (!response.ok) {
533:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
534:       'review_context_github_api_error',
535:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}`
536:     );
537:   }
538: 
539:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
540:   return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
541: }
542: 
543: async function fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(
544:   env: Env,
545:   repo: string,
546:   changedPaths: string[],
547:   lookbackSessions: number
548: ): Promise<{
549:   related: Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>;
550:   sessionsScanned: number;
551: }> {
552:   const commits = await fetchGitHubArray(
553:     env,
554:     `https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits?sha=entire/checkpoints/v1&per_page=${lookbackSessions}`
555:   );
556: 
557:   const changedSet = new Set(changedPaths);
558:   const frequency = new Map<string, { count: number; sessions: Set<string> }>();
559:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
560: 
561:   for (const commit of commits.slice(0, lookbackSessions)) {
562:     const commitRecord = asRecord(commit);
563:     const sha = readOptionalString(commitRecord.sha);
564:     if (!sha) {
565:       continue;
566:     }
567: 
568:     const detail = await fetchGitHubJson(env, `https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits/${sha}`);
569:     const files = Array.isArray(detail.files) ? detail.files : [];
570:     const metadataPaths = files
571:       .map((entry) => readOptionalString(asRecord(entry).filename))
572:       .filter((path): path is string => Boolean(path && path.endsWith('/metadata.json')))
573:       .slice(0, 3);
574: 
575:     const touchedFiles = new Set<string>();
576:     for (const metadataPath of metadataPaths) {
577:       const file = await fetchGitHubJson(env, `https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/contents/${metadataPath}?ref=${sha}`);
578:       const content = readOptionalString(file.content);
579:       if (!content) {
580:         continue;
581:       }
582:       let decoded = '';
583:       try {
584:         decoded = atob(content.replace(/\n/g, ''));
585:       } catch {
586:         continue;
587:       }
588:       try {
589:         const metadata = JSON.parse(decoded) as unknown;
590:         for (const path of parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(asRecord(metadata))) {
591:           touchedFiles.add(path);
592:         }
593:       } catch {
594:         continue;
595:       }
596:     }
597: 
598:     if (touchedFiles.size === 0) {
599:       continue;
600:     }
601: 
602:     sessionsScanned += 1;
603:     const matchesChanged = Array.from(touchedFiles).some((path) => changedSet.has(path));
604:     if (!matchesChanged) {
605:       continue;
606:     }
607: 
608:     for (const path of touchedFiles) {
609:       if (changedSet.has(path)) {
610:         continue;
611:       }
612:       const next = frequency.get(path) ?? { count: 0, sessions: new Set<string>() };
613:       next.count += 1;
614:       next.sessions.add(sha);
615:       frequency.set(path, next);
616:     }
617:   }
618: 
619:   const related = Array.from(frequency.entries())
620:     .map(([path, value]) => ({
621:       path,
622:       frequency: value.count,
623:       sessionIds: Array.from(value.sessions),
624:     }))
625:     .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency);
626: 
627:   return {
628:     related,
629:     sessionsScanned,
630:   };
631: }
632: 
633: async function assembleReviewContextBootstrap(
634:   env: Env,
635:   review: ReviewRunResponse
636: ): Promise<ReviewContext> {
637:   const COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS = 5;
638:   const COCHANGE_TOP_N = 20;
639:   const CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT = 10;
640: 
641:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
642:     reviewId: review.id,
643:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_started',
644:     payload: {
645:       source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
646:     },
647:   });
648: 
649:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, review.workspaceId);
650:   const checkpointId = workspace?.checkpointId?.trim() ?? '';
651:   if (!checkpointId) {
652:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
653:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
654:       'Review context assembly requires an Entire checkpoint-backed workspace with a checkpointId.'
655:     );
656:   }
657: 
658:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
659:   if (!deployment) {
660:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError('review_context_deployment_not_found', `Deployment ${review.deploymentId} was not found.`);
661:   }
662: 
663:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
664:   const requestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
665:   const sessionIds = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds));
666:   if (sessionIds.length === 0) {
667:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
668:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
669:       'Review context assembly requires at least one Entire sessionId in deployment provenance.'
670:     );
671:   }
672: 
673:   const sessionId = sessionIds[0] ?? '';
674:   const sessionIntentCandidates = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext));
675:   const sessionIntent = sessionIntentCandidates[0] ?? null;
676:   const attributionTrailer = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.attributionTrailer);
677:   const agentType = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.agentType);
678:   const tokenBudget =
679:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.reviewContextTokenBudget) ??
680:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.contextTokenBudget) ??
681:     null;
682: 
683:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
684:     reviewId: review.id,
685:     eventType: 'review_context_checkpoint_context_collected',
686:     payload: {
687:       checkpointId,
688:       sessionId,
689:       sessionCount: sessionIds.length,
690:       hasSessionIntent: Boolean(sessionIntent),
691:     },
692:   });
693: 
694:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
695:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
696:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
697:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
698:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
699:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
700:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
701:       : null;
702:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
703:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
704:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
705:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
706:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
707:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
708:         : null;
709: 
710:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
711:     env,
712:     review.workspaceId,
713:     provenanceOperationId,
714:     reviewDiffArtifactId
715:   );
716:   const diffPatch = authoritativeDiff?.patch ?? null;
717:   const changedPaths = diffPatch ? parseChangedPathsFromDiff(diffPatch) : [];
718:   const diffHunks = diffPatch ? parseDiffHunks(diffPatch) : [];
719: 
720:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
721:     reviewId: review.id,
722:     eventType: 'review_context_diff_collected',
723:     payload: {
724:       source: authoritativeDiff?.source ?? null,
725:       artifactId: authoritativeDiff?.artifactId ?? null,
726:       hasDiff: Boolean(diffPatch),
727:       patchBytes: diffPatch ? new TextEncoder().encode(diffPatch).byteLength : 0,
728:     },
729:   });
730: 
731:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
732:     reviewId: review.id,
733:     eventType: 'review_context_changed_files_collected',
734:     payload: {
735:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
736:     },
737:   });
738: 
739:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
740:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
741:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
742:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
743:   if (!deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
744:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
745:       'review_context_source_bundle_missing',
746:       'Review context assembly requires deployment source bundle key.'
747:     );
748:   }
749: 
750:   const changedFileReads = changedPaths.length
751:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
752:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
753:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-changed`,
754:         paths: changedPaths,
755:       })
756:     : [];
757:   const changedFiles = changedFileReads
758:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
759:     .map((item) => ({
760:       path: item.path,
761:       content: item.content ?? '',
762:       byteSize: item.bytes,
763:       source: 'changed' as const,
764:     }));
765: 
766:   const conventionCandidates = discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT);
767:   const conventionReads = conventionCandidates.length
768:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
769:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
770:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-conventions`,
771:         paths: conventionCandidates,
772:       })
773:     : [];
774:   const conventionFiles = conventionReads
775:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
776:     .slice(0, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT)
777:     .map((item) => ({
778:       path: item.path,
779:       content: item.content ?? '',
780:       byteSize: item.bytes,
781:       source: 'convention' as const,
782:     }));
783: 
784:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
785:     reviewId: review.id,
786:     eventType: 'review_context_conventions_collected',
787:     payload: {
788:       candidateCount: conventionCandidates.length,
789:       conventionFileCount: conventionFiles.length,
790:       maxCount: CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT,
791:     },
792:   });
793: 
794:   const repoSlug =
795:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repo) ??
796:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repository) ??
797:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_REPO);
798:   if (!repoSlug) {
799:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
800:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
801:       'Review context assembly requires repository slug in deployment provenance (provenance.repo).'
802:     );
803:   }
804:   let relatedFiles: Array<{
805:     path: string;
806:     content: string;
807:     byteSize: number;
808:     source: 'related';
809:     score: number;
810:     coChangeFrequency: number;
811:     supportingSessionIds: string[];
812:   }> = [];
813:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
814:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
815:     reviewId: review.id,
816:     eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_started',
817:     payload: {
818:       repo: repoSlug,
819:       lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
820:     },
821:   });
822: 
823:   const relatedFrequency = new Map<string, { frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>();
824:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
825:     const cached = await getReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
826:       filePath: changedPath,
827:       repo: repoSlug,
828:     });
829:     let entries = cached?.cochange;
830:     const cachedLookbackSessions = cached?.lookbackSessions ?? null;
831:     if (!entries || cachedLookbackSessions !== COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS) {
832:       const fetched = await fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(env, repoSlug, [changedPath], COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS);
833:       entries = fetched.related;
834:       sessionsScanned += fetched.sessionsScanned;
835:       await upsertReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
836:         filePath: changedPath,
837:         repo: repoSlug,
838:         branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
839:         cochange: entries,
840:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
841:       });
842:     }
843: 
844:     for (const entry of entries) {
845:       const existing = relatedFrequency.get(entry.path) ?? { frequency: 0, sessionIds: [] };
846:       existing.frequency += entry.frequency;
847:       existing.sessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...existing.sessionIds, ...entry.sessionIds]));
848:       relatedFrequency.set(entry.path, existing);
849:     }
850:   }
851: 
852:   const rankedRelated = Array.from(relatedFrequency.entries())
853:     .map(([path, value]) => ({ path, ...value }))
854:     .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency)
855:     .slice(0, COCHANGE_TOP_N);
856: 
857:   const relatedReads = rankedRelated.length
858:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
859:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
860:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-related`,
861:         paths: rankedRelated.map((item) => item.path),
862:       })
863:     : [];
864:   const readByPath = new Map(relatedReads.map((item) => [item.path, item]));
865:   relatedFiles = rankedRelated
866:     .flatMap((item) => {
867:       const read = readByPath.get(item.path);
868:       if (!read || read.content === null || read.error) {
869:         return [];
870:       }
871:       return [
872:         {
873:           path: item.path,
874:           content: read.content,
875:           byteSize: read.bytes,
876:           source: 'related' as const,
877:           score: item.frequency,
878:           coChangeFrequency: item.frequency,
879:           supportingSessionIds: item.sessionIds,
880:         },
881:       ];
882:     });
883: 
884:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
885:     reviewId: review.id,
886:     eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_completed',
887:     payload: {
888:       repo: repoSlug,
889:       relatedFileCount: relatedFiles.length,
890:       topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
891:     },
892:   });
893: 
894:   const assembledAt = new Date().toISOString();
895:   const contextId = generateReviewContextId();
896:   const contextPayload: ReviewContext = {
897:     id: contextId,
898:     reviewId: review.id,
899:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
900:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
901:     commitSha: workspace?.commitSha ?? '',
902:     assembledAt,
903:     checkpoint: {
904:       checkpointId,
905:       branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
906:       attributionTrailer,
907:       session: {
908:         sessionId,
909:         agentType,
910:         sessionIntent,
911:       },
912:     },
913:     retrieval: {
914:       changedFiles,
915:       diffHunks,
916:       relatedFiles,
917:       conventionFiles,
918:       coChange: {
919:         source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
920:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
921:         sessionsScanned,
922:         filesConsidered: changedPaths.length,
923:         topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
924:       },
925:     },
926:     stats: {
927:       totalFilesIncluded: changedFiles.length + relatedFiles.length + conventionFiles.length,
928:       totalBytesIncluded:
929:         changedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
930:         relatedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
931:         conventionFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0),
932:       estimatedTokens: estimateTokenCount([
933:         diffPatch ?? '',
934:         ...changedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
935:         ...relatedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
936:         ...conventionFiles.map((item) => item.content),
937:       ]),
938:       tokenBudget,
939:     },
940:   };
941: 
942:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
943:     reviewId: review.id,
944:     eventType: 'review_context_budget_checked',
945:     payload: {
946:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
947:       tokenBudget,
948:       exceeded: tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget,
949:     },
950:   });
951: 
952:   if (tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget) {
953:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
954:       'review_context_budget_exceeded',
955:       `ReviewContext estimated token usage (${contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens}) exceeds configured budget (${tokenBudget}). Increase the budget and retry.`
956:     );
957:   }
958: 
959:   const storageBucketCandidates = [env.REVIEW_CONTEXTS, env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, env.SOURCE_BUNDLES];
960:   const storageBucket = storageBucketCandidates.find(
961:     (bucket): bucket is R2Bucket => Boolean(bucket && typeof bucket.put === 'function')
962:   );
963:   if (!storageBucket) {
964:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
965:       'review_context_storage_unavailable',
966:       'REVIEW_CONTEXTS, WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, or SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is required for review context assembly.'
967:     );
968:   }
969: 
970:   const r2Key = `review-context/${review.id}/${contextId}.json`;
971:   const serialized = JSON.stringify(contextPayload);
972:   await storageBucket.put(r2Key, serialized, {
973:     httpMetadata: {
974:       contentType: 'application/json',
975:     },
976:   });

1013: async function loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1014:   env: Env,
1015:   workspaceId: string,
1016:   operationId: string | null,
1017:   reviewDiffArtifactId: string | null
1018: ): Promise<{ source: 'artifact_patch'; artifactId: string; patch: string } | null> {
1019:   const getArtifactObject = async (objectKey: string): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null> => {
1020:     const fromArtifacts = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(objectKey) : null;
1021:     if (fromArtifacts) {
1022:       return fromArtifacts;
1023:     }
1024:     return env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(objectKey) : null;
1025:   };
1026: 
1027:   if (reviewDiffArtifactId) {
1028:     const reviewArtifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, reviewDiffArtifactId);
1029:     if (reviewArtifact && reviewArtifact.artifact.type === 'patch') {
1030:       const object = await getArtifactObject(reviewArtifact.objectKey);
1031:       if (!object) {
1032:         return null;
1033:       }
1034:       return {
1035:         source: 'artifact_patch',
1036:         artifactId: reviewDiffArtifactId,
1037:         patch: await object.text(),
1038:       };
1039:     }
1040:   }
1041: 
1042:   if (!operationId) {
1043:     return null;
1044:   }
1045: 
1046:   const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1047:   if (!operation || operation.type !== 'export_patch' || operation.status !== 'succeeded') {
1048:     return null;
1049:   }
1050: 
1051:   const result = asRecord(operation.result);
1052:   const artifactId = typeof result.artifactId === 'string' ? result.artifactId.trim() : '';
1053:   if (!artifactId) {
1054:     return null;
1055:   }
1056: 
1057:   const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
1058:   if (!artifact || artifact.artifact.type !== 'patch') {
1059:     return null;
1060:   }
1061: 
1062:   const object = await getArtifactObject(artifact.objectKey);
1063:   if (!object) {
1064:     return null;
1065:   }
1066: 
1067:   return {
1068:     source: 'artifact_patch',
1069:     artifactId,
1070:     patch: await object.text(),
1071:   };
1072: }

1222:     } else if (reviewAgentEnabled && !deploymentSourceBundleKey) {

1339: async function executeReviewRun(
1340:   env: Env,
1341:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1342:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1343:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1344: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1345:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1346:     reviewId: review.id,
1347:     eventType: 'review_preflight_started',
1348:     payload: {
1349:       targetType: review.target.type,
1350:       mode: review.mode,
1351:     },
1352:   });
1353:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1354:     reviewId: review.id,
1355:     eventType: 'review_preflight_completed',
1356:     payload: {
1357:       ok: true,
1358:     },
1359:   });
1360:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1361:     reviewId: review.id,
1362:     eventType: 'review_analysis_started',
1363:     payload: {
1364:       deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1365:       workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1366:     },
1367:   });
1368: 
1369:   const target = asRecord(payload.target);
1370:   const targetType = typeof target.type === 'string' ? target.type : review.target.type;
1371:   if (targetType !== 'workspace_deployment') {
1372:     throw new Error(`Unsupported review target type: ${targetType}`);
1373:   }
1374: 
1375:   const report = await buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1376:   for (const finding of report.findings) {
1377:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1378:       reviewId: review.id,
1379:       eventType: 'review_finding_emitted',
1380:       payload: {
1381:         findingId: finding.id,
1382:         severity: finding.severity,
1383:         confidence: finding.confidence,
1384:         title: finding.title,
1385:       },
1386:     });
1387:   }
1388: 
1389:   return report;
1390: }

1392: export async function processReviewRun(env: Env, reviewId: string): Promise<void> {
1393:   const claimed = await claimReviewRunForExecution(env.DB, reviewId);
1394:   if (!claimed) {
1395:     const existing = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1396:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1397:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review run is already running; defer redelivery');
1398:     }
1399:     return;
1400:   }
1401: 
1402:   let review: ReviewRunResponse | null = null;
1403:   try {
1404:     review = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1405:     if (!review) {
1406:       return;
1407:     }
1408: 
1409:     const payload = await getReviewRunRequestPayload(env.DB, reviewId);
1410:     if (!payload) {
1411:       await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1412:         errorCode: 'review_not_found',
1413:         errorMessage: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1414:       });
1415:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1416:         reviewId,
1417:         eventType: 'review_failed',
1418:         payload: {
1419:           code: 'review_not_found',
1420:           message: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1421:         },
1422:       });
1423:       return;
1424:     }
1425: 
1426:     const reviewContext = await assembleReviewContextBootstrap(env, review);
1427:     const report = await executeReviewRun(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1428:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1429:       reviewId,
1430:       eventType: 'review_finalize_started',
1431:       payload: {
1432:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1433:       },
1434:     });
1435:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, report.findings);
1436:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'succeeded', {
1437:       report,
1438:       markdownSummary: report.markdownSummary,
1439:       errorCode: null,
1440:       errorMessage: null,
1441:     });
1442:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1443:       reviewId,
1444:       eventType: 'review_succeeded',
1445:       payload: {
1446:         recommendation: report.summary.recommendation,
1447:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1448:       },
1449:     });
1450:   } catch (error) {
1451:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1452:     const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1453:     const attemptCount = latest?.attemptCount ?? review?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1454: 
1455:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || transientReviewFailure(message)) && attemptCount <= REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES) {
1456:       await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);

1463:         errorMessage: message,
1464:       });

1466:         reviewId,
1467:         eventType: 'review_retry_scheduled',
1468:         payload: {
1469:           attemptCount,
1470:           maxRetries: REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES,
1471:         },
1472:       });
1473:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review transient failure; retry requested');
1474:     }
1475: 
1476:     const contextAssemblyErrorCode = error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError ? error.code : null;
1477:     const finalErrorCode = contextAssemblyErrorCode ?? 'review_execution_failed';
1478:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1479:       errorCode: finalErrorCode,
1480:       errorMessage: message,
1481:     });

1500:       });

metadata.preview:
-- Migration: 0010_review_context_retrieval.sql
-- Description: add review context blob references and co-change cache for phase 1 retrieval

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_context_blobs (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    review_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    r2_key TEXT NOT NULL,
    byte_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
    estimated_tokens INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),

    FOREIGN KEY (review_id) REFERENCES review_runs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (workspace_id) REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (deployment_id) REFERENCES workspace_deployments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_review_context_blobs_review
    ON review_context_blobs(review_id);

1520:       return;
1521:     }
1522:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1523:       return;
1524:     }
1525:   }
1526: }
1527: 
1528: export function shouldRetryReviewError(error: unknown): boolean {
1529:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1530:     return true;
1531:   }
1532: 
1533:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1534:   return transientReviewFailure(message);
1535: }

313: function isUniqueConstraintError(error: unknown): boolean {
314:   if (!(error instanceof Error)) {
315:     return false;
316:   }
317: 
318:   return /unique constraint failed/i.test(error.message);
319: }
320: 
321: function phaseFromStatus(status: JobStatus): JobPhase {
322:   switch (status) {
323:     case 'queued':
324:       return 'queued';
325:     case 'running':
326:       return 'building';
327:     case 'completed':
328:       return 'completed';
329:     case 'failed':
330:       return 'failed';
331:     case 'cancelled':
332:       return 'cancelled';
333:   }
334: }
335: 
336: /**
337:  * Generate a unique job ID
338:  */
339: function generatePrefixedId(prefix: string, length = 8): string {
340:   const chars = 'REDACTED';
341:   let id = '';
342:   for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {
343:     id += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
344:   }
345:   return `${prefix}_${id}`;
346: }
347: 
348: /**
349:  * Generate a unique job ID
350:  */
351: export function generateJobId(): string {
352:   return generatePrefixedId('job');
353: }
354: 
355: /**
356:  * Generate a unique workspace ID
357:  */
358: export function generateWorkspaceId(): string {
359:   return generatePrefixedId('ws');
360: }
361: 
362: export function generateWorkspaceOperationId(): string {
363:   return generatePrefixedId('op');
364: }
365: 
366: export function generateWorkspaceArtifactId(): string {
367:   return generatePrefixedId('art');
368: }
369: 
370: export function generateWorkspaceTaskId(): string {
371:   return generatePrefixedId('task');
372: }

374: export function generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(): string {
375:   return generatePrefixedId('dep');
376: }

379:   return generatePrefixedId('rev');

382: /**
383:  * Convert snake_case DB record to camelCase API response
384:  */
385: function toJobResponse(record: JobRecord): JobResponse {
386:   const phase = record.phase ?? phaseFromStatus(record.status);
387: 
388:   return {
389:     id: record.id,
390:     prompt: record.prompt,
391:     model: record.model,
392:     status: record.status,
393:     phase,
394:     createdAt: record.created_at,
395:     startedAt: record.started_at,
396:     completedAt: record.completed_at,
397:     cancelRequestedAt: record.cancel_requested_at,
398:     cancelledAt: record.cancelled_at,
399:     previewUrl: record.preview_url,
400:     deployedUrl: record.deployed_url,
401:     codeUrl: record.code_url,
402:     codeZipUrl: record.code_zip_url,
403:     errorMessage: record.error_message,
404:     errorCode: record.error_code,
405:     fileCount: record.file_count,
406:     currentAttempt: record.current_attempt,
407:     retryCount: record.retry_count,
408:     sourceType: record.source_type ?? null,
409:     checkpointId: record.checkpoint_id ?? null,
410:     commitSha: record.commit_sha ?? null,
411:     sourceRef: record.source_ref ?? null,
412:     sourceProjectRoot: record.source_project_root ?? null,
413:     buildRunTestsIfPresent:
414:       record.build_run_tests_if_present === null || record.build_run_tests_if_present === undefined
415:         ? null
416:         : Boolean(record.build_run_tests_if_present),
417:     buildRunLintIfPresent:
418:       record.build_run_lint_if_present === null || record.build_run_lint_if_present === undefined
419:         ? null
420:         : Boolean(record.build_run_lint_if_present),
421:     sourceBundleKey: record.source_bundle_key ?? null,
422:     sourceBundleSha256: record.source_bundle_sha256 ?? null,
423:     sourceBundleBytes: record.source_bundle_bytes ?? null,
424:   };
425: }

471: function parseJsonOrFallback(value: string | null, fallback: unknown): unknown {
472:   if (!value) {
473:     return fallback;
474:   }
475: 
476:   try {
477:     return JSON.parse(value);
478:   } catch {
479:     return fallback;
480:   }
481: }

483: function toWorkspaceOperationResponse(record: WorkspaceOperationRecord): WorkspaceOperationResponse {
484:   const warnings = parseJsonOrFallback(record.warnings_json, []);
485:   const result = parseJsonOrFallback(record.result_json, undefined);
486:   const errorDetails = parseJsonOrFallback(record.error_details_json, undefined);
487: 
488:   const response: WorkspaceOperationResponse = {
489:     id: record.id,
490:     type: record.type,
491:     status: record.status,
492:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
493:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
494:     createdAt: record.created_at,
495:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
496:   };
497: 
498:   if (result !== undefined) {
499:     response.result = result;
500:   }
501:   if (Array.isArray(warnings) && warnings.length > 0) {
502:     response.warnings = warnings;
503:   }
504:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
505:     response.error = {
506:       code: record.error_code,
507:       message: record.error_message,
508:       details: errorDetails,
509:     };
510:   }
511: 
512:   return response;
513: }
514:

518: 
519:   return {
520:     id: record.id,
521:     type: record.type,
522:     status: record.status,
523:     bytes: record.bytes,
524:     contentType: record.content_type,
525:     sha256: record.sha256,
526:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
527:     sourceBaselineSha: record.source_baseline_sha,
528:     creatorId: record.creator_id,
529:     createdAt: record.created_at,
530:     expiresAt: record.retention_expires_at,
531:     warnings: Array.isArray(warnings) ? warnings : [],
532:     metadata,
533:   };
534: }

536: function toWorkspaceTaskResponse(record: WorkspaceTaskRecord): WorkspaceTaskResponse {
537:   const result = parseJsonOrFallback(record.result_json, undefined);
538: 
539:   const response: WorkspaceTaskResponse = {
540:     id: record.id,
541:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
542:     status: record.status,
543:     prompt: record.prompt,
544:     provider: record.provider,
545:     model: record.model,
546:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
547:     maxSteps: record.max_steps,
548:     maxRetries: record.max_retries,
549:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
550:     startedAt: record.started_at,
551:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
552:     cancelRequestedAt: record.cancel_requested_at,
553:     createdAt: record.created_at,
554:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
555:   };
556: 
557:   if (result !== undefined) {
558:     response.result = result;
559:   }
560: 
561:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
562:     response.error = {
563:       code: record.error_code,
564:       message: record.error_message,
565:     };
566:   }
567: 
568:   return response;
569: }

571: function toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(record: WorkspaceDeploymentRecord): WorkspaceDeploymentResponse {
572:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
573:   const result = parseJsonOrFallback(record.result_json, undefined);

575:   const remediations = parseJsonOrFallback(record.remediations_json, []);
576: 
577:   const response: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse = {
578:     id: record.id,

582:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
583:     maxRetries: record.max_retries,
584:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
585:     sourceSnapshotSha256: record.source_snapshot_sha256,
586:     sourceBundleKey: record.source_bundle_key,
587:     deployedUrl: record.deployed_url,
588:     providerDeploymentId: record.provider_deployment_id,
589:     cancelRequestedAt: record.cancel_requested_at,
590:     startedAt: record.started_at,
591:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
592:     createdAt: record.created_at,
593:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
594:     provenance: (provenance as Record<string, unknown>) ?? {},
595:     toolchain: (toolchain as WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null) ?? null,
596:     dependencyCacheKey: record.dependency_cache_key,
597:     dependencyCacheHit: Boolean(record.dependency_cache_hit),
598:     remediations: Array.isArray(remediations) ? (remediations as WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[]) : [],
599:   };
600: 
601:   if (result !== undefined) {
602:     response.result = result;
603:   }
604: 
605:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
606:     response.error = {
607:       code: record.error_code,
608:       message: record.error_message,
609:     };
610:   }
611: 
612:   return response;

619: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
620:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
621:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
622:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
623: 
624:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
625:     id: record.id,
626:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
627:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
628:     target: {
629:       type: record.target_type,
630:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
631:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
632:     },
633:     mode: record.mode,
634:     status: record.status,
635:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
636:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
637:     startedAt: record.started_at,
638:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
639:     createdAt: record.created_at,
640:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
641:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
642:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
643:     provenance: {
644:       sessionIds:
645:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
646:       promptSummary:
647:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
648:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
649:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
650:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
651:             : null,
652:       transcriptUrl:
653:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
654:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
655:           : null,
656:     },
657:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
658:   };
659: 
660:   if (report?.summary) {
661:     response.summary = report.summary;
662:   }
663:   if (report?.intent) {
664:     response.intent = report.intent;
665:   }
666:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
667:     response.error = {
668:       code: record.error_code,
669:       message: record.error_message,
670:     };
671:   }
672: 
673:   return response;
674: }

676: /**
677:  * Create a new checkpoint job in the database
678:  */
679: export async function createCheckpointJob(
680:   db: D1Database,
681:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
682: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
683:   const result = await db
684:     .prepare(
685:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
686:          id,
687:          prompt,
688:          model,
689:          status,
690:          phase,
691:          source_type,
692:          checkpoint_id,
693:          commit_sha,
694:          source_ref,
695:          source_project_root,
696:          build_run_tests_if_present,
697:          build_run_lint_if_present,
698:          source_bundle_key,
699:          source_bundle_sha256,
700:          source_bundle_bytes
701:        )
702:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
703:        RETURNING *`
704:     )
705:     .bind(
706:       input.id,
707:       input.prompt,
708:       input.checkpointId,
709:       input.commitSha,
710:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
711:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
712:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
713:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
714:       input.sourceBundleKey,
715:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
716:       input.sourceBundleBytes
717:     )
718:     .first<JobRecord>();
719: 
720:   if (!result) {
721:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
722:   }
723: 
724:   return toJobResponse(result);
725: }
726: 
727: /**
728:  * Get a job by ID
729:  */
730: export async function getJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<JobResponse | null> {
731:   const result = await db
732:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id = ?')
733:     .bind(id)
734:     .first<JobRecord>();
735: 
736:   if (!result) {
737:     return null;
738:   }
739: 
740:   return toJobResponse(result);
741: }
742: 
743: /**
744:  * List all jobs, most recent first
745:  */
746: export async function listJobs(db: D1Database, limit = 50): Promise<JobListItem[]> {
747:   const result = await db
748:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?')
749:     .bind(limit)
750:     .all<JobRecord>();
751: 
752:   return result.results.map(toJobListItem);
753: }
754: 
755: /**
756:  * Delete a job by ID
757:  */
758: export async function deleteJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<void> {
759:   await db.prepare('DELETE FROM jobs WHERE id = ?').bind(id).run();
760: }

762: /**
763:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
764:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
765:  */
766: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
767:   const result = await db
768:     .prepare(
769:       `UPDATE jobs
770:        SET status = 'running',
771:            phase = 'building',
772:            started_at = ?,
773:            error_message = NULL,
774:            error_code = NULL
775:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
776:     )
777:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
778:     .run();
779: 
780:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
781:   return changes > 0;
782: }

784: /**
785:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
786:  */
787: export async function appendJobEvent(
788:   db: D1Database,
789:   input: {
790:     jobId: string;
791:     attemptNo?: number;
792:     eventType: string;
793:     phase: JobPhase;
794:     payload: unknown;
795:   }
796: ): Promise<number> {
797:   const sequenceResult = await db
798:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
799:     .bind(input.jobId)
800:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
801: 
802:   if (!sequenceResult) {
803:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
804:   }
805: 
806:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
807:   await db
808:     .prepare(
809:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
810:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
811:     )
812:     .bind(
813:       input.jobId,
814:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
815:       seq,
816:       input.eventType,
817:       input.phase,
818:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
819:     )
820:     .run();
821: 
822:   return seq;
823: }

825: /**
826:  * List persisted job events from a given sequence.
827:  */
828: export async function listJobEvents(
829:   db: D1Database,
830:   jobId: string,
831:   fromExclusive = 0,
832:   limit = 500
833: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
834:   const result = await db
835:     .prepare(
836:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
837:        FROM job_events
838:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
839:        ORDER BY seq ASC
840:        LIMIT ?`
841:     )
842:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
843:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
844: 
845:   return result.results.map((row) => {
846:     let payload: unknown;
847:     try {
848:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
849:     } catch {
850:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
851:     }
852: 
853:     return {
854:       seq: row.seq,
855:       eventType: row.event_type,
856:       phase: row.phase,
857:       payload,
858:       createdAt: row.created_at,
859:     };
860:   });

863: /**

866: export async function updateJobStatus(
867:   db: D1Database,
868:   id: string,
869:   status: JobStatus,
870:   additionalFields?: {
871:     phase?: JobPhase;
872:     started_at?: string | null;
873:     completed_at?: string | null;
874:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
875:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
876:     preview_url?: string;
877:     deployed_url?: string;
878:     code_url?: string;
879:     code_zip_url?: string;
880:     error_message?: string | null;
881:     error_code?: string | null;
882:     retry_count?: number;
883:     file_count?: number;
884:     // Metrics fields
885:     prompt_tokens?: number;
886:     completion_tokens?: number;
887:     total_tokens?: number;
888:     cost?: number;
889:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
890:     install_duration_ms?: number;
891:     build_duration_ms?: number;
892:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
893:     total_duration_ms?: number;
894:     lines_of_code?: number;
895:   }
896: ): Promise<void> {
897:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
898:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
899: 
900:   if (additionalFields) {
901:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
902:       updates.push('phase = ?');
903:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
904:     }
905:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
906:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
907:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);
908:     }
909:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
910:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');
911:       values.push(additionalFields.completed_at);
912:     }
913:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
914:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
915:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
916:     }
917:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
918:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
919:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
920:     }
921:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
922:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
923:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
924:     }
925:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
926:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
927:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
928:     }
929:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
930:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
931:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
932:     }
933:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
934:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
935:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
936:     }
937:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
938:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
939:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
940:     }
941:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
942:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
943:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
944:     }
945:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
946:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
947:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
948:     }
949:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
950:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
951:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
952:     }
953:     // Metrics fields
954:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
955:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
956:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
957:     }
958:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
959:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
960:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
961:     }
962:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
963:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
964:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
965:     }
966:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
967:       updates.push('cost = ?');
968:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
969:     }
970:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
971:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
972:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);
973:     }
974:     if (additionalFields.install_duration_ms !== undefined) {
975:       updates.push('install_duration_ms = ?');
976:       values.push(additionalFields.install_duration_ms);
977:     }
978:     if (additionalFields.build_duration_ms !== undefined) {
979:       updates.push('build_duration_ms = ?');
980:       values.push(additionalFields.build_duration_ms);
981:     }
982:     if (additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms !== undefined) {
983:       updates.push('deploy_duration_ms = ?');
984:       values.push(additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms);
985:     }
986:     if (additionalFields.total_duration_ms !== undefined) {
987:       updates.push('total_duration_ms = ?');
988:       values.push(additionalFields.total_duration_ms);
989:     }
990:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
991:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
992:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
993:     }
994:   }
995: 
996:   values.push(id);
997: 
998:   await db
999:     .prepare(`UPDATE jobs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1000:     .bind(...values)
1001:     .run();
1002: }

1077: /**
1078:  * Update workspace status and selected metadata.
1079:  */
1080: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(
1081:   db: D1Database,
1082:   id: string,
1083:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1084:   additionalFields?: {
1085:     baseline_ready?: number;
1086:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1087:     error_code?: string | null;
1088:     error_message?: string | null;
1089:   },
1090:   options?: {
1091:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1092:   }
1093: ): Promise<boolean> {
1094:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1095:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1096: 
1097:   if (additionalFields) {
1098:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1099:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1100:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1101:     }
1102:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1103:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1104:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1105:     }
1106:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1107:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1108:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1109:     }
1110:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1111:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1112:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1113:     }
1114:   }
1115: 
1116:   values.push(id);
1117: 
1118:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1119:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1120:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1121:   }
1122: 
1123:   const result = await db
1124:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1125:     .bind(...values)
1126:     .run();
1127: 
1128:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1129: }
