1247: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1248:   db: D1Database,
1249:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1250: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1251:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1252:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1253:     .prepare(
1254:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1255:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1256:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1257:        LIMIT 1`
1258:     )
1259:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1260:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1261: 
1262:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1263:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1264:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1265:     }
1266: 
1267:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1268:     if (!existingOperation) {
1269:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1270:     }
1271:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1272:   }
1273: 
1274:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1275:     await db
1276:       .prepare(
1277:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1278:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1279:       )
1280:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1281:       .run();
1282:   }
1283: 
1284:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1285:   const operationId = input.id;
1286: 
1287:   const operationRecord = await db
1288:     .prepare(
1289:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1290:          id,
1291:          workspace_id,
1292:          type,
1293:          status,
1294:          actor_id,
1295:          auth_principal_json,
1296:          request_payload_json,
1297:          request_payload_sha256,
1298:          idempotency_key,
1299:          warnings_json
1300:        )
1301:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1302:        RETURNING *`
1303:     )
1304:     .bind(
1305:       operationId,
1306:       input.workspaceId,
1307:       input.type,
1308:       input.actorId ?? null,
1309:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1310:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1311:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1312:       input.idempotencyKey
1313:     )
1314:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1315: 
1316:   if (!operationRecord) {
1317:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1318:   }
1319: 
1320:   try {
1321:     await db
1322:       .prepare(
1323:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1324:            id,
1325:            workspace_id,
1326:            operation_type,
1327:            idempotency_key,
1328:            operation_id,
1329:            request_payload_sha256,
1330:            expires_at
1331:          )
1332:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1333:       )
1334:       .bind(
1335:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1336:         input.workspaceId,
1337:         input.type,
1338:         input.idempotencyKey,
1339:         operationId,
1340:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1341:         expiresAt
1342:       )
1343:       .run();
1344:   } catch (error) {
1345:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1346:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1347:       throw error;
1348:     }
1349: 
1350:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1351:       .prepare(
1352:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1353:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1354:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1355:          LIMIT 1`
1356:       )
1357:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1358:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1359: 
1360:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1361:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1362:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1363:     }
1364:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1365:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1366:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1367:     }
1368: 
1369:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1370:     if (!existingOperation) {
1371:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1372:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1373:     }
1374:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1375:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1376:   }
1377: 
1378:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1379: }
1380: 
1381: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1382:   db: D1Database,
1383:   workspaceId: string,
1384:   operationId: string
1385: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1386:   const result = await db
1387:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1388:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1389:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1390: 
1391:   if (!result) {
1392:     return null;
1393:   }
1394: 
1395:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1396: }

1398: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1399:   db: D1Database,
1400:   workspaceId: string,
1401:   operationId: string
1402: ): Promise<boolean> {
1403:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1404:   const result = await db
1405:     .prepare(
1406:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1407:        SET status = 'running',
1408:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1409:            updated_at = ?
1410:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1411:     )
1412:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1413:     .run();
1414: 
1415:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1416: }

1418: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1419:   db: D1Database,
1420:   operationId: string,
1421:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1422:   options?: {
1423:     result?: unknown;
1424:     warnings?: unknown[];
1425:     errorCode?: string | null;
1426:     errorClass?: string | null;
1427:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1428:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1429:     startedAt?: string | null;
1430:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1431:   }
1432: ): Promise<void> {
1433:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1434:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1435: 
1436:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1437:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1438:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1439:   }
1440:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1441:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1442:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1443:   }
1444:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1445:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1446:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1447:   }
1448:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1449:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1450:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1451:   }
1452:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1453:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1454:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1455:   }
1456:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1457:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1458:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1459:   }
1460:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1461:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1462:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1463:   }
1464:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1465:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1466:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1467:   }
1468:   if (status === 'running') {
1469:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1470:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1471:   }
1472:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1473:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1474:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1475:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1476:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1477:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1478:   }
1479: 
1480:   values.push(operationId);
1481: 
1482:   await db
1483:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1484:     .bind(...values)
1485:     .run();
1486: }

1581: export async function createWorkspaceTask(
1582:   db: D1Database,
1583:   input: CreateWorkspaceTaskInput
1584: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1585:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1586:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1587:     .prepare(
1588:       `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1589:        FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1590:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1591:        LIMIT 1`
1592:     )
1593:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1594:     .first<{ task_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1595: 
1596:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1597:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1598:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1599:     }
1600: 
1601:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.task_id);
1602:     if (!existingTask) {
1603:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${existingIdempotency.task_id}`);
1604:     }
1605: 
1606:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1607:   }
1608: 
1609:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1610:     await db
1611:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_task_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
1612:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1613:       .run();
1614:   }
1615: 
1616:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1617:   const taskRecord = await db
1618:     .prepare(
1619:       `INSERT INTO workspace_tasks (
1620:          id,
1621:          workspace_id,
1622:          status,
1623:          prompt,
1624:          provider,
1625:          model,
1626:          idempotency_key,
1627:          request_payload_json,
1628:          request_payload_sha256,
1629:          max_steps,
1630:          max_retries,
1631:          actor_id,
1632:          tool_policy_json
1633:        )
1634:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
1635:        RETURNING *`
1636:     )
1637:     .bind(
1638:       input.id,
1639:       input.workspaceId,
1640:       input.prompt,
1641:       input.provider,
1642:       input.model,
1643:       input.idempotencyKey,
1644:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1645:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1646:       input.maxSteps,
1647:       input.maxRetries,
1648:       input.actorId ?? null,
1649:       JSON.stringify(input.toolPolicy ?? {})
1650:     )
1651:     .first<WorkspaceTaskRecord>();
1652: 
1653:   if (!taskRecord) {
1654:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace task');
1655:   }
1656: 
1657:   try {
1658:     await db
1659:       .prepare(
1660:         `INSERT INTO workspace_task_idempotency (
1661:            id,
1662:            workspace_id,
1663:            idempotency_key,
1664:            task_id,
1665:            request_payload_sha256,
1666:            expires_at
1667:          )
1668:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1669:       )
1670:       .bind(
1671:         generatePrefixedId('wtsk'),
1672:         input.workspaceId,
1673:         input.idempotencyKey,
1674:         input.id,
1675:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1676:         expiresAt
1677:       )
1678:       .run();
1679:   } catch (error) {
1680:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1681:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1682:       throw error;
1683:     }
1684: 
1685:     const concurrent = await db
1686:       .prepare(
1687:         `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1688:          FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1689:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1690:          LIMIT 1`
1691:       )
1692:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1693:       .first<{ task_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1694: 
1695:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
1696:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1697:       throw new Error('Task idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1698:     }
1699: 
1700:     if (concurrent.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1701:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1702:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1703:     }
1704: 
1705:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.task_id);
1706:     if (!existingTask) {
1707:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1708:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${concurrent.task_id}`);
1709:     }
1710: 
1711:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1712:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1713:   }
1714: 
1715:   return { task: toWorkspaceTaskResponse(taskRecord), reused: false };
1716: }

2023: 
2024:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2025:   const existingDeploymentByKey = await db
2026:     .prepare(
2027:       `SELECT *
2028:        FROM workspace_deployments
2029:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2030:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2031:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2032:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2033:        LIMIT 1`
2034:     )
2035:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2036:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2037: 
2038:   if (existingDeploymentByKey) {
2039:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingDeploymentByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2040:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2041:     }
2042: 
2043:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2044:     try {
2045:       await db
2046:         .prepare(
2047:           `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2048:              id,
2049:              workspace_id,
2050:              idempotency_key,
2051:              deployment_id,
2052:              request_payload_sha256,
2053:              expires_at
2054:            )
2055:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2056:         )
2057:         .bind(
2058:           generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2059:           input.workspaceId,
2060:           input.idempotencyKey,
2061:           existingDeploymentByKey.id,
2062:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2063:           expiresAt
2064:         )
2065:         .run();
2066:     } catch (error) {
2067:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2068:         throw error;
2069:       }
2070:     }
2071: 
2072:     return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(existingDeploymentByKey), reused: true };
2073:   }
2074: 
2075:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2076:   const deploymentRecord = await db
2077:     .prepare(
2078:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployments (
2079:          id,
2080:          workspace_id,
2081:          status,
2082:          provider,
2083:          idempotency_key,
2084:          request_payload_json,
2085:          request_payload_sha256,
2086:          max_retries,
2087:          provenance_json,
2088:          created_at,
2089:          updated_at
2090:        )
2091:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2092:        RETURNING *`
2093:     )
2094:     .bind(
2095:       input.id,
2096:       input.workspaceId,
2097:       input.provider,
2098:       input.idempotencyKey,
2099:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2100:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2101:       input.maxRetries,
2102:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2103:       now,
2104:       now
2105:     )
2106:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2107: 
2108:   if (!deploymentRecord) {
2109:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace deployment');
2110:   }
2111: 
2112:   try {
2113:     await db
2114:       .prepare(
2115:         `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2116:            id,
2117:            workspace_id,
2118:            idempotency_key,
2119:            deployment_id,
2120:            request_payload_sha256,
2121:            expires_at
2122:          )
2123:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2124:       )
2125:       .bind(
2126:         generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2127:         input.workspaceId,
2128:         input.idempotencyKey,
2129:         input.id,
2130:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2131:         expiresAt
2132:       )
2133:       .run();
2134:   } catch (error) {
2135:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2136:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2137:       throw error;
2138:     }
2139: 
2140:     const concurrent = await db
2141:       .prepare(
2142:         `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2143:          FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2144:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2145:          LIMIT 1`
2146:       )
2147:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2148:       .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2149: 
2150:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2151:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2152:       throw new Error('Deployment idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2153:     }
2154: 
2155:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2156:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2157:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2158:     }
2159: 
2160:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.deployment_id);
2161:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2162:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2163:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${concurrent.deployment_id}`);
2164:     }
2165: 
2166:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2167:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2168:   }
2169: 
2170:   return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(deploymentRecord), reused: false };
2171: }

2173: export async function getWorkspaceDeployment(

2214: export async function claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(
2215:   db: D1Database,
2216:   workspaceId: string,

2235: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2236:   db: D1Database,
2237:   deploymentId: string,
2238:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2239:   options?: {
2240:     workspaceId?: string;
2241:     result?: unknown;
2242:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2243:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2244:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2245:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2246:     errorCode?: string | null;
2247:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2248:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2249:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2250:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2251:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2252:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2253:     startedAt?: string | null;
2254:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2255:   }
2256: ): Promise<void> {
2257:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2258:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2259:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2260: 
2261:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2262:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2263:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2264:   }
2265:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2266:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2267:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2268:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2269:   }
2270:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2271:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2272:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2273:   }
2274:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2275:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2276:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2277:   }
2278:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2279:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2280:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2281:   }
2282:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2283:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2284:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2285:   }
2286:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2287:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2288:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2289:   }
2290:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2291:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2292:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2293:   }
2294:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2295:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2296:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2297:   }
2298:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2299:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2300:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2301:   }
2302:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2303:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2304:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2305:   }
2306:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2307:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2308:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2309:   }
2310:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2311:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2312:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2313:   }
2314:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2315:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2316:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2317:   }
2318: 
2319:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2320:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2321:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2322:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2323:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2324:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2325:     }
2326:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2327:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2328:   }
2329: 
2330:   values.push(deploymentId);
2331:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2332:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2333:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2334:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2335:   }
2336:   if (status === 'running') {
2337:     whereClause += " AND status IN ('queued', 'running')";
2338:   }
2339: 
2340:   await db
2341:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2342:     .bind(...values)
2343:     .run();
2344: }

2346: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(

2373:            updated_at = ?
2374:        WHERE id = ?
2375:          AND workspace_id = ?
2376:          AND status = 'running'

2385:       input.finishedAt,

2387:       updatedAt,
2388:       input.deploymentId,

2391:     .run();

2396: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2397:   db: D1Database,
2398:   workspaceId: string,
2399:   deploymentId: string
2400: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2401:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2402:   const queuedResult = await db
2403:     .prepare(
2404:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2405:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2406:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2407:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2408:            error_code = NULL,
2409:            error_message = NULL,
2410:            updated_at = ?
2411:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2412:     )
2413:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2414:     .run();
2415: 
2416:   const runningResult = await db
2417:     .prepare(
2418:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2419:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2420:            updated_at = ?
2421:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2422:     )
2423:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2424:     .run();
2425: 
2426:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2427: 
2428:   return {
2429:     deployment,
2430:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2431:   };
2432: }

2434: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2435:   db: D1Database,
2436:   input: {
2437:     workspaceId: string;
2438:     deploymentId: string;
2439:     eventType: string;
2440:     payload: unknown;
2441:   }
2442: ): Promise<number> {
2443:   const seqResult = await db
2444:     .prepare(
2445:       'UPDATE workspace_deployments SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2446:     )
2447:     .bind(input.deploymentId, input.workspaceId)
2448:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2449: 
2450:   if (!seqResult) {
2451:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace deployment ${input.deploymentId}`);
2452:   }
2453: 
2454:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);
2455:   await db
2456:     .prepare(
2457:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_events (workspace_id, deployment_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
2458:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2459:     )
2460:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.deploymentId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
2461:     .run();
2462: 
2463:   return seq;
2464: }

2466: export async function listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(
2467:   db: D1Database,
2468:   workspaceId: string,
2469:   deploymentId: string,
2470:   fromExclusive = 0,
2471:   limit = 500
2472: ): Promise<WorkspaceDeploymentEventItem[]> {
2473:   const result = await db
2474:     .prepare(
2475:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
2476:        FROM workspace_deployment_events
2477:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND deployment_id = ? AND seq > ?
2478:        ORDER BY seq ASC
2479:        LIMIT ?`
2480:     )
2481:     .bind(workspaceId, deploymentId, fromExclusive, limit)
2482:     .all<WorkspaceDeploymentEventRecord>();

2484:   return result.results.map((row) => {
2485:     let payload: unknown;
2486:     try {
2487:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
2488:     } catch {
2489:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
2490:     }
2491: 
2492:     return {
2493:       seq: row.seq,
2494:       eventType: row.event_type,
2495:       payload,
2496:       createdAt: row.created_at,
2497:     };
2498:   });
2499: }

2520: export async function createReviewRun(
2521:   db: D1Database,
2522:   input: CreateReviewRunInput
2523: ): Promise<{ review: ReviewRunResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2524:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2525:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2526:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2527:     .prepare(
2528:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2529:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2530:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2531:        LIMIT 1`
2532:     )
2533:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2534:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2535: 
2536:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2537:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2538:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2539:     }
2540: 
2541:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2542:     if (!existingReview) {
2543:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2544:     }
2545: 
2546:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2547:   }
2548: 
2549:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2550:     await db
2551:       .prepare('DELETE FROM review_run_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2552:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2553:       .run();
2554:   }
2555: 
2556:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2557:   const existingReviewByKey = await db
2558:     .prepare(
2559:       `SELECT *
2560:        FROM review_runs
2561:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2562:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2563:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2564:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2565:        LIMIT 1`
2566:     )
2567:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2568:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2569: 
2570:   if (existingReviewByKey) {
2571:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReviewByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2572:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2573:     }
2574: 
2575:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2576:     try {
2577:       await db
2578:         .prepare(
2579:           `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2580:              id,
2581:              workspace_id,
2582:              idempotency_key,
2583:              review_id,
2584:              request_payload_sha256,
2585:              expires_at
2586:            )
2587:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2588:         )
2589:         .bind(
2590:           generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2591:           input.workspaceId,
2592:           input.idempotencyKey,
2593:           existingReviewByKey.id,
2594:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2595:           expiresAt
2596:         )
2597:         .run();
2598:     } catch (error) {
2599:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2600:         throw error;
2601:       }
2602:     }
2603: 
2604:     return { review: toReviewRunResponse(existingReviewByKey), reused: true };
2605:   }
2606: 
2607:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2608:   const reviewRecord = await db
2609:     .prepare(
2610:       `INSERT INTO review_runs (
2611:          id,
2612:          workspace_id,
2613:          deployment_id,
2614:          target_type,
2615:          mode,
2616:          status,
2617:          idempotency_key,
2618:          request_payload_json,
2619:          request_payload_sha256,
2620:          provenance_json,
2621:          created_at,
2622:          updated_at
2623:        )
2624:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2625:        RETURNING *`
2626:     )
2627:     .bind(
2628:       input.id,
2629:       input.workspaceId,
2630:       input.deploymentId,
2631:       input.targetType,
2632:       input.mode,
2633:       input.idempotencyKey,
2634:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2635:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2636:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2637:       now,
2638:       now
2639:     )
2640:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2641: 
2642:   if (!reviewRecord) {
2643:     throw new Error('Failed to create review run');
2644:   }
2645: 
2646:   try {
2647:     await db
2648:       .prepare(
2649:         `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2650:            id,
2651:            workspace_id,
2652:            idempotency_key,
2653:            review_id,
2654:            request_payload_sha256,
2655:            expires_at
2656:          )
2657:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2658:       )
2659:       .bind(
2660:         generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2661:         input.workspaceId,
2662:         input.idempotencyKey,
2663:         input.id,
2664:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2665:         expiresAt
2666:       )
2667:       .run();
2668:   } catch (error) {
2669:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2670:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2671:       throw error;
2672:     }
2673: 
2674:     const concurrent = await db
2675:       .prepare(
2676:         `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2677:          FROM review_run_idempotency
2678:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2679:          LIMIT 1`
2680:       )
2681:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2682:       .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2683: 
2684:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2685:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2686:       throw new Error('Review idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2687:     }
2688: 
2689:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2690:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2691:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2692:     }
2693: 
2694:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, concurrent.review_id);
2695:     if (!existingReview) {
2696:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2697:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${concurrent.review_id}`);
2698:     }
2699: 
2700:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2701:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2702:   }
2703: 
2704:   return { review: toReviewRunResponse(reviewRecord), reused: false };
2705: }
2706: 
2707: export async function getReviewRun(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {
2708:   const record = await db.prepare('SELECT * FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(reviewId).first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2709:   if (!record) {
2710:     return null;
2711:   }
2712: 
2713:   return toReviewRunResponse(record);
2714: }

2716: export async function getReviewRunByIdempotency(
2717:   db: D1Database,
2718:   workspaceId: string,
2719:   idempotencyKey: string,
2720:   requestPayloadSha256: string,
2721:   requestPayloadSha256Aliases: string[] = []
2722: ): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {
2723:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2724:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([requestPayloadSha256, ...requestPayloadSha256Aliases]);
2725:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2726:     .prepare(
2727:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2728:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2729:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2730:        LIMIT 1`
2731:     )
2732:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey)
2733:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2734: 
2735:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2736:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2737:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2738:     }
2739: 
2740:     const review = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2741:     if (!review) {
2742:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2743:     }
2744: 
2745:     return review;
2746:   }
2747: 
2748:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2749:   const existingReview = await db
2750:     .prepare(
2751:       `SELECT *
2752:        FROM review_runs
2753:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2754:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2755:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2756:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2757:        LIMIT 1`
2758:     )
2759:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2760:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2761: 
2762:   if (!existingReview) {
2763:     return null;
2764:   }
2765: 
2766:   if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReview.request_payload_sha256)) {
2767:     throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2768:   }
2769: 
2770:   return toReviewRunResponse(existingReview);
2771: }

2797: export async function claimReviewRunForExecution(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<boolean> {
2798:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2799:   const result = await db
2800:     .prepare(
2801:       `UPDATE review_runs
2802:        SET status = 'running',
2803:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
2804:            attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
2805:            error_code = NULL,
2806:            error_message = NULL,
2807:            updated_at = ?
2808:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2809:     )
2810:     .bind(now, now, reviewId)
2811:     .run();
2812: 
2813:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2814: }

2816: export async function updateReviewRunStatus(
2817:   db: D1Database,
2818:   reviewId: string,
2819:   status: ReviewRunStatus,
2820:   options?: {
2821:     report?: ReviewReport | null;
2822:     markdownSummary?: string | null;
2823:     errorCode?: string | null;
2824:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2825:     startedAt?: string | null;
2826:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2827:   }
2828: ): Promise<void> {
2829:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2830:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2831: 
2832:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2833:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2834:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2835:   }
2836:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2837:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2838:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2839:   }
2840:   if (options?.report !== undefined) {
2841:     updates.push('report_json = ?');
2842:     values.push(options.report ? JSON.stringify(options.report) : null);
2843:   }
2844:   if (options?.markdownSummary !== undefined) {
2845:     updates.push('markdown_summary = ?');
2846:     values.push(options.markdownSummary);
2847:   }
2848:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2849:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2850:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2851:   }
2852:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2853:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2854:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2855:   }
2856:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2857:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2858:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2859:   }
2860: 
2861:   values.push(reviewId);
2862:   await db.prepare(`UPDATE review_runs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`).bind(...values).run();
2863: }

2884:     .prepare(
2885:       `INSERT INTO review_events (review_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
2886:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
2887:     )

3060:     filePath: string;
3061:     repo: string;
3062:   }
3063: ): Promise<{ cochange: Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>; lastUpdated: string; lookbackSessions: number } | null> {
3064:   const record = await db
3065:     .prepare(
3066:       `SELECT cochange_json, last_updated, lookback_sessions
3067:        FROM review_cochange_cache
3068:        WHERE file_path = ? AND repo = ?
3069:        LIMIT 1`
3070:     )
3071:     .bind(input.filePath, input.repo)
3072:     .first<{ cochange_json: string; last_updated: string; lookback_sessions: number }>();
3073: 
3074:   if (!record) {
3075:     return null;
3076:   }
3077:

3079:   try {
3080:     const parsed = JSON.parse(record.cochange_json) as unknown;
3081:     if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
3082:       cochange = parsed.filter((item): item is { path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] } => {
3083:         const entry = item as Record<string, unknown>;
3084:         return typeof entry.path === 'string' && typeof entry.frequency === 'number' && Array.isArray(entry.sessionIds);
3085:       });
3086:     }
3087:   } catch {
3088:     cochange = [];
3089:   }
3090: 
3091:   return {
3092:     cochange,
3093:     lastUpdated: record.last_updated,
3094:     lookbackSessions: Number(record.lookback_sessions),
3095:   };

3258: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(
3259:   db: D1Database,
3260:   workspaceId: string,
3261:   input: {
3262:     deploymentId: string;
3263:     status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
3264:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
3265:     deployedAt?: string | null;
3266:     errorCode?: string | null;
3267:     errorMessage?: string | null;
3268:   }
3269: ): Promise<void> {
3270:   const updates: string[] = [
3271:     'last_deployment_id = ?',
3272:     'last_deployment_status = ?',
3273:     'last_deployment_error_code = ?',
3274:     'last_deployment_error_message = ?',
3275:     'updated_at = ?',
3276:   ];
3277:   const values: Array<string | null> = [
3278:     input.deploymentId,
3279:     input.status,
3280:     input.errorCode ?? null,
3281:     input.errorMessage ?? null,
3282:     new Date().toISOString(),
3283:   ];
3284: 
3285:   if (input.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
3286:     updates.push('last_deployed_url = ?');
3287:     values.push(input.deployedUrl);

3290:     updates.push('last_deployed_at = ?');

3294:   values.push(workspaceId);

3296:   await db
3297:     .prepare(
3298:       `UPDATE workspaces
3299:        SET ${updates.join(', ')}
3300:        WHERE id = ?

3302:            SELECT 1
3303:            FROM workspace_deployments candidate
3304:            LEFT JOIN workspace_deployments current ON current.id = workspaces.last_deployment_id
3305:            WHERE candidate.id = ?
3306:              AND candidate.workspace_id = workspaces.id
3307:              AND (

3309:                OR current.id IS NULL
3310:                OR workspaces.last_deployment_id = candidate.id
3311:                OR julianday(candidate.created_at) > julianday(current.created_at)
3312:                OR (
3313:                  julianday(candidate.created_at) = julianday(current.created_at)
3314:                  AND (current.id IS NULL OR candidate.rowid >= current.rowid)
3315:                )

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts

parts.text:
- **Medium** `packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:832` computes co-change results with `fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(env, repoSlug, [changedPath], ...)`, so each lookup excludes only the current file, not the full changed set.  
  - **Why this is a bug:** when a deployment changes multiple files, other changed files can be re-added as “related” files.  
  - **When it breaks:** any diff with 2+ changed files where historical sessions touched those files together.  
  - **Impact:** duplicated context (`changedFiles` + `relatedFiles`), inflated token estimate, and avoidable `review_context_budget_exceeded` failures.  
  - **Fix:** pass the full `changedPaths` set into each fetch (or filter `rankedRelated` against all changed paths before reading).

- **Medium** `packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:643` (`toReviewRunResponse`) still maps only `sessionIds`, `promptSummary`, and `transcriptUrl` from `report.provenance`, but the new `reviewContextRef` and `reviewContextStats` are dropped.  
  - **Why this is a bug:** the new provenance fields are written into `report_json` but never surfaced in API responses.  
  - **When it breaks:** callers of `getReviewRun`/review APIs expecting to consume the stored review-context reference or stats will always see them missing.  
  - **Fix:** extend provenance mapping in `toReviewRunResponse` to include `reviewContextRef` and `reviewContextStats` when present.
